description.value:
Gengen osharus adapted to the seawaters of Pabaq's briny seas and are credited for mapping the continents of Pabaq as they spread settlements along the coast. Among osharus, gengens are known for their daring, and many famous osharu explorers trace their origins to gengen communities. Gengens are amphibious and can survive indefinitely on land but find immersion in water to be relaxing, and thus they prefer working on aquatic or archipelagic planets for easy access to swimming.

You gain a swim Speed of 20 feet, and you gain the amphibious trait, enabling you to breathe in water and air.
